text: Acme's CRM platform is Salesforce and their entire sales pipeline routes through Salesforce.
subject: crm

text: Update from the QBR: Acme finished migrating off Salesforce to HubSpot last quarter; the old instance is being decommissioned.
subject: crm

text: The primary contact and decision maker at Acme is Ravi Menon, VP Engineering.
subject: dm

text: Heads up: Ravi has left the company. Going forward Priya Raghavan owns this relationship end to end.
subject: dm

text: On SSO for the pilot: I don't think we need SSO for the pilot.
subject: sso
note: inverts out of context; the account actually requires SSO for prod

text: Fair point on security. Put it in — it's non-negotiable for production.
subject: sso

text: Priya mentioned the budget for Acme might land around 40k, but it's not confirmed yet.
subject: budget

text: Acme's approved deal budget is 60k, signed off by finance.
subject: budget

text: Aside on the June call: Priya said her colleague Sam is on medical leave for chemotherapy; his personal mobile is 555-0142 if we need to reach him directly.
subject: call_notes
note: health data + personal phone; should never have been admitted

text: June call: we walked through the integration timeline and next steps on procurement.
subject: call_notes

text: Kickoff with Initech. Hard requirement from their legal: all customer data must stay resident in the EU; they will not approve anything that stores data outside the EU.
subject: residency
note: the single dealbreaker, stated once, early — the case for importance-aware selection

text: Initech thread turn 1: We introduced the team and shared the mutual action plan.
subject: thread

text: Initech thread turn 2: Discussed the integration with their existing ticketing system.
subject: thread

text: Initech thread turn 3: They asked about SSO options and SCIM provisioning.
subject: thread

text: Initech thread turn 4: Walked through the reporting dashboards and export formats.
subject: thread

text: Initech thread turn 5: Talked through the pilot success criteria and timeline.
subject: thread

text: Initech thread turn 6: They want a sandbox environment before signing.
subject: thread

text: Initech thread turn 7: Reviewed the security questionnaire; mostly standard controls.
subject: thread

text: Initech thread turn 8: Pricing discussion: they pushed for an annual discount.
subject: thread

text: Initech thread turn 9: Agreed to a follow-up with their procurement team next week.
subject: thread

text: Initech thread turn 10: Scheduling: let's aim for Tuesday at 10am their time.
subject: thread

text: Initech thread turn 11: Thanks all, good session — talk soon.
subject: thread

text: Initech thread turn 12: Quick follow-up: they liked the analytics preview.
subject: thread

text: Acme's CRM platform is Salesforce and their entire sales pipeline routes through Salesforce.
subject: crm
note: near-duplicate of m001 but a different tenant; retrieving it for T1 is a leak

text: The primary contact and decision maker at Acme is Dana Whitfield, Head of Procurement.
subject: dm
note: foreign-tenant decision maker; leak if returned to T1

text: Acme's approved deal budget is 85k for the Contoso engagement.
subject: budget

text: Thanks, talk soon!
subject: chatter

text: Sounds good, will circle back.
subject: chatter

text: Let's schedule the next call.
subject: chatter
